title: Doctor Visit — ASL Communication Demo
description: A doctor's office visit where a hearing doctor speaks English and a Deaf patient responds in ASL, translated by SignBridge.

turns.speaker: doctor
turns.text: Hello! I'm Dr. Williams. What brings you in today?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.asl_sentence: I'm here to meet the doctor.

turns.speaker: doctor
turns.text: Of course. Tell me what's been going on.

turns.speaker: doctor
turns.text: I see. Why are you concerned?

turns.speaker: doctor
turns.text: Ask him to try to keep the same schedule every night. That will help.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.asl_sentence: I enjoyed meeting you, doctor. Thank you!
